LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE GENERAL NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF'S ORIGINAL COMPLAINT MAKES CLEAR THAT THE INJURY OCCURRED AFTER PLAINTIFF DISEMBARKED FROM THE LIGHT RAIL VEHICLE. PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTRADICTS THE ORIGINAL COMPLAINT IN THAT IT ATTEMPTS TO ALLEGE THAT PLAINTIFF WAS INJURED WHILE DISEMBARKING. SUCH ALLEGATIONS WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED. POTTER V ARIZONA SOUTHERN COACH LINES (1988) 202 CAL APP 3D 126, 133 FN 2. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCES: LOREN E. SCHWARTZ, ESQUIRE AND BRYAN D. LAMB, ESQUIRE (THE DOLAN LAW FIRM, 415.421.2800) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DAVID W. AMMONS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY (OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3954) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE GENERAL NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF'S ORIGINAL COMPLAINT MAKES CLEAR THAT THE INJURY OCCURRED AFTER PLAINTIFF DISEMBARKED FROM THE LIGHT RAIL VEHICLE. PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTRADICTS THE ORIGINAL COMPLAINT IN THAT IT ATTEMPTS TO ALLEGE THAT PLAINTIFF WAS INJURED WHILE DISEMBARKING. SUCH ALLEGATIONS WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED. POTTER V ARIZONA SOUTHERN COACH LINES (1988) 202 CAL APP 3D 126, 133 FN 2. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCES: CHRISTOPHER B. DOLAN, ESQUIRE (THE DOLAN LAW FIRM, 415.421.2800) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DAVID W. AMMONS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY (OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3954) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: DISCUSSED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR A DANGEROUS CONDITION OF PUBLIC PROPERTY. GIVEN THE FACTS ALLEGED, THERE DOES NOT APPEAR TO BE A BASIS FOR PLAINTIFF TO STATE A CLAIM BASED ON COMMON CARRIER LIABILITY. COURT SUSTAINS, WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND, THE DEMURRER AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Continued To Feb-25-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
